features: Radox Soak & Soothe Bathing Collection features a full-size bath soak, bath salts and a luxury shower puff
Surprise a loved one with this gift set that’s sure to soak away their aches and pains in a steamy herbal bath
Radox Muscle Soak Bath Soak 500 ml relieves tired, aching or damaged muscles with a soothing blend of sea minerals and sage
Radox Muscle Soak Bath Salts 400 g leave the skin silky smooth and relax the mind with an aromatic thyme scent
Our gift set is complemented by a Radox shower puff – an extra gift for a luxurious bath experience
Radox gift sets are the perfect way to show your loved ones how much you care, no matter the occasion
description: Product Description Know someone who could use some relaxation in their life? Treat them to some me time with the Radox Soak & Soothe Bathing Collection. This gift set includes a full-size bath soak, bath salts and a luxury shower puff to make their cleansing ritual extra special. They will find themselves luxuriating in a steaming bath, enveloped by nature-inspired, mood-transforming fragrances. Enriched with our unique blend of 4 minerals and 13 herbs, Radox Muscle Soak Bath Soak helps your loved one create a relaxing bath therapy ritual that melts away muscle tension. From troubles to bubbles, they will close their eyes, relax and recover. Radox Muscle Soak Bath Salts are crafted with 100% pure sea salt, rich in calcium, sodium and magnesium. They blend minerals and herbs with a soothing thyme scent to relieve tired muscles and leave the skin feeling silky smooth. From reviving the tired feet of early travellers to helping hardworking people find a moment of solitude and sanctuary, Radox is rooted in the transformative power of mineral therapy. Give the gift of an aromatherapy ritual with this bath soak and bath salts collection. Designed to revive the body, mind and soul, our gift sets make the perfect gift for any occasion (or a well-deserved treat for yourself). Ingredients Radox Muscle Soak Bath Gel 500ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium EDTA, Maris Sal, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, CI 19140, CI 42090. Radox Muscle Soak Salts 400g INGREDIENTS: Maris Sal, Sodium Sesquicarbonate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Parfum, Propylene Glycol, Isopropyl Myristate, Aqua, Sodium Carbonate, Sodium Sulfate, Thymus Vulgaris Flower/Leaf Extract, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, CI 77007, CI 42090 Directions Pour desired amount of Radox Muscle Soak Bath Soak into a running bath. Ensure water temperature is comfortable. Add Radox Muscle Soak Bath Salts to the bath. Stir gently to disperse. Avoid contact with eyes. Be careful when stepping in and out of the bath. Safety Warning Radox Muscle Soak Bath Gel 500ml Bath Product: Avoid contact with eyes. If eye contact occurs rinse well with water. If rash or irritation occurs, discontinue use. Radox Muscle Soak Salts 400g Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. Please take care when stepping out of the bath as it may be slippery. See more
